# Summary

Describe the research, documentation, automation, or presentation update introduced by this pull request.

## Type of Change

- [ ] New research paper
- [ ] Update to existing research
- [ ] Source or citation improvement
- [ ] Diagram or asset update
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Automation or build change

## Research Checklist

- [ ] The topic slug is stable, descriptive, and contains no dates
- [ ] Front matter includes title, description, keywords, author, created, and updated
- [ ] References are included where appropriate
- [ ] Claims are supported by attributable sources with valid links
- [ ] Assets are stored in the article-local `assets/` directory
- [ ] Links were validated locally

## Validation

- [ ] `python scripts/validate_links.py`
- [ ] `cd website && hugo --minify`

## Notes for Reviewers

Add context, unresolved questions, or source notes that would help review this change.
